title: viola ruppii
intro: Viola ruppii, also known as Viola biflora, is a perennial plant species belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Viola ruppii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola ruppii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
